title: Zara India is Hiring: Floor Manager (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Zara India is Hiring: Floor Manager (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Zara India! We are hiring a Floor Manager for our Varanasi team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Zara India:
Zara India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Zara India!
